title: Five-Day Market Visit
description: Wander a rotating traditional market (owe-il-jang) and meet the vendors who grow, catch, and cook what they sell.
local_story: Jeju's five-day markets predate modern retail and still structure how many residents shop for produce and seafood — a direct window into everyday local life.
source_note: This is MVP experience-card data connected to JEJU-KB. It is not a real commercial product listing.
